name: Mega Menu Panel
description: Targets one standard root category and adds curated links plus one optional graphical feature to its submenu.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Mega Menu Panel
attribute_definition_groups.description: Targets one standard root category and adds curated links plus one optional graphical feature to its submenu.

attribute_definitions.name: Target root category
attribute_definitions.description: Select the top-level catalog category whose standard submenu this panel augments.

attribute_definitions.name: Panel heading
attribute_definitions.description: Optional editorial heading above the extra links and feature.

attribute_definitions.name: Supporting text
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short introduction for the panel.

attribute_definitions.name: Extra links heading
attribute_definitions.description: Optional accessible label displayed above the curated links.

attribute_definitions.name: Show category link
attribute_definitions.description: Adds a direct link to the target category below the panel heading.

attribute_definitions.name: Category link label
attribute_definitions.description: Defaults to “View all” in the current storefront language when empty.

attribute_definitions.name: Content order
attribute_definitions.description: Choose whether curated links or the graphical feature appears first.

attribute_definitions.name: Panel surface
attribute_definitions.description: Token-based surface that remains compatible with storefront themes and dark mode.

attribute_definitions.name: Density
attribute_definitions.description: Controls spacing inside the editorial panel.

attribute_definitions.name: Desktop width
attribute_definitions.description: Width reserved for this editorial panel beside the inherited category navigation.

attribute_definitions.name: Catalog banner behavior
attribute_definitions.description: Inherit the global setting, use the catalog banner only as fallback, replace it, or show it alongside the Page Designer feature.
